notes: Top-level pages are renamed locally from *.dc.html to *.html (dropping the middle "dc") so GitHub Pages' clean-URL resolution (/PageName -> PageName.html) works -- it does NOT resolve the double extension *.dc.html. Header.dc.html/Footer.dc.html keep their original name: support.js's <dc-import> fetches partials by a hardcoded "<name>.dc.html" suffix, and they're never navigated to directly so they don't need clean URLs. `remote` is always the path inside the Claude Design project (get_file/list_files use this); `local` is where it's written in this repo -- use `local` when writing, `remote` when calling DesignSync. Internal <a href> links across Header.dc.html/Footer.dc.html/pages use extensionless hrefs (e.g. href="Lien_He", href="./" for home) relying on GitHub Pages' auto .html resolution -- new pages/links must follow the same convention.
